name: SSG 08 | 血染风采
descriptionEn: The SSG08 bolt-action is a low-damage but very cost-effective sniper rifle, making it a smart choice for early-round long-range marksmanship. It has been painted with an olive grip and maroon slide. Shame, the inscriptions have worn away with use...
descriptionZh: SSG08 是一把低杀伤力但性价比较高的闩动狙击步枪，是早期回合长距离射击的明智选择。 枪身绘有一个黄棕色握把以及绛红色的套筒。 很遗憾，枪上铭文随着岁月的流逝已荡然无存。
